zh.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Rancon是Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay和Isabelle d’Angoulème的兒子，於1175年出生在法國阿奎泰吉洛德。他於1195年與Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES在法國努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1263年9月在法國享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Rancon是Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay和Isabelle d’Angoulème的儿子，于1175年出生在法国阿奎泰吉洛德。他于1195年与Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES在法国努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1263年9月在法国享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rancon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Lançon): diminutive of Lance ‘lance, spear’, or perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived in a thickly wooded area, or a metonymic occupational name for a woodcutter, from Old French lançon ‘branch of a tree’. Compare Lanson .
French (Lançon): habitational name from the town so named, in Bouches-du-Rhône.

variants.name: Lanson
meanings: French: variant of Lançon (see Lancon 1 and 2) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this (or an altered form of Lancon 3). This surname is also found in England, where it is of Huguenot origin.
English: variant of   Langston  , itself probably a variant of   Langton  .

variants.name: Lance
meanings: English: from the ancient Germanic personal name Lanzo, originally a short form of various compound names with the first element land ‘land, territory’ (for example, Lambert ), but later used as an independent name. It was introduced to England by the Normans, for whom it was a popular name among the ruling classes, perhaps partly because of association with Old French lance ‘lance, spear’ (see 2 below).
French: metonymic occupational name for a soldier who carried a lance, or a nickname for a skilled fighter, from Old French lance ‘lance, spear’.
Americanized form of German   Lanz   and   Lenz  .

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Rancon was born in 1175, in Gironde, Aquitaine, France as the son of Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay and Isabelle d’Angoulème. He married Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES in 1195, in Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in September 1263, in France, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Rancon est né en 1175, à Gironde, Aquitaine, France, fils de Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay et Isabelle d’Angoulème. Il a épousé Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES en 1195, à Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en septembre 1263, à France, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Rancon wurde 1175 in Gironde, Aquitaine, Frankreich, als Sohn von Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay und Isabelle d’Angoulème geboren. Er hat 1195 in Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im September 1263 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Rancon è nato il nel 1175 nel Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia come figlio di Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay e Isabelle d’Angoulème. Lui sposato Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES nel 1195, nel Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1263, nel Francia, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Ranconは1175年にフランスアクイティアインギロンドでGeoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et GencayとIsabelle d’Angoulèmeの息子として生まれた。1195年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインギロンドでJeanne MAINGOT de SURGERESと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1263年9月にフランスで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Rancon(은)는 1175년 프랑스 아키테인 지론드에서 Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay(와)과 Isabelle d’Angoulème의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1195년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 지론드에서 Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1263년 9월 프랑스에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Rancon nasceu em 1175, em Gironde, Aquitaine, França filho de Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay e Isabelle d’Angoulème. Ele casou-se com Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES em 1195, em Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1263, em França, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Rancon родился в 1175 г. в местности гиронд, аквитеин, Франция. Его родителей звали Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay и Isabelle d’Angoulème. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES в 1195 г. в местности гиронд, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер сентябрь 1263 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Rancon nació en 1175, en Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia como hijo de Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay y Isabelle d’Angoulème. Se casó con Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES en 1195, en Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en septiembre de 1263, en Francia, a la edad de 88 años.
